llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Sales Manager - Surface Treatment Vietnam
job.description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION Segment: Cold forming (wire drawing, tube drawing, cold forging) Region: APAC (mainly China, India and SEA) Provide troubleshooting activities support new line start-ups Survey key/strategic accounts to provide continuous improvement suggestions and support MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Provide technical support, virtual and on-site for regional key/strategic customers in the APAC region – focus on cold forming (wire tube drawing; cold forging) (escalation function and back-up for local teams like tech. sales, TSS and Onsite if existing) Handle trouble shooting onsite including lab simulations of field scenarios in collaboration with Application team Support line audits Provide product recommendation Manage line starts especially for bath make-up calculation, initial parameter checks after, if necessary align with local teams on corrections/counter measures after first production Manage technical trainings in close collaboration with customers and sales teams Communicate with regional and global colleagues in English, being the link between local, regional and international colleagues Prepare and share trouble shooting experiences and lessons learned regionally Communicate technology gaps and opportunities to Regional Marketing Managers Consult for layouting of new plants and plant optimization Support and be back-up of Application team if necessary Supporting sales and segments gaining new customer projects JOB REQUIREMENTS At least Bachelor of Chemistry/engineering or related preferred At least 5 years of working experience in surface treatment or related industry Microsoft Office user skills (i.e. PowerPoint, Excel, Word, Outlook) Strong in intercultural communication
